markdown:
### Chapter 316. State Unif. Traffic Control
##### § 316.08 — Requirements of flagpersons

(1) Operate in accordance with all safety requirements prescribed by law and the Department of Transportation;

(2) Operate only on the routes authorized by a special permit issued pursuant to s. 316.550 authorizing the specific vehicle and the load the flagperson or escort vehicle is accompanying; and

(3) Meet any additional conditions required in the special permit.

subsections.text: Operate in accordance with all safety requirements prescribed by law and the Department of Transportation;
Operate only on the routes authorized by a special permit issued pursuant to s. 316.550 authorizing the specific vehicle and the load the flagperson or escort vehicle is accompanying; and
Meet any additional conditions required in the special permit.
